title: Illegal casts not caught
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(a INT, b VARCHAR(50), c FLOAT, d DATE);
INSERT INTO test_table(a, c) VALUES(5, CAST('not_a_float' AS FLOAT));
INSERT INTO test_table(a, b, c) VALUES(3, NULL, 2.5);
key_bug_features: Inserting values with incorrect data types
